title: London
overview: Bobby drives back and forth between Vienna and Salzburg, giving lifts to strangers on the way, sharing conversations that drift from the mundane to the deeply personal. In this tender portrait of today’s Europe, anonymity and warmth still go hand in hand.

title: FaceTape
overview: A junkie decides to come clean from abusing an analog VR drug called FaceTape only to find his life outside of his addiction is far from stable.

title: Pouramika
overview: A poetry short film

title: Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down
overview: "Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down" is a documentary film about British social policy. The focus is on the political struggle against neoliberal austerity policies, which have their origins in the hated Thatcher government.  The film features the former socialist MP Dave Nellist, who is now the national chair of the Trade Unionist & Socialist Coalition and Hannah Sell, the general secretary of the Socialist Party. The film features a local election campaign in the miners' town of Nuneaton, students campaigning against an increase in tuition fees and refuse workers from Birmingham striking against massive cuts to their wages.

title: Almost Cupid
overview: To get his wings, a newly hired cupid must choose between doing the job and honouring free will after being assigned to save a toxic relationship that shouldn't exist.

title: Touken Ranbu the Stage: Hiden Tsuki to Taiyou to Hoshiboshi yo
overview: Stageplay based on Touken Ranbu.

title: The Wronged of Juiced
overview: Gus sees a boy drinking juice. It is not the same as he remembers.

title: Summer's End
overview: Grace has spent the summer looking after her dad, who is still mourning over the loss of his wife who died when Grace was a child. When her unpredictable older brother Oscar brings his friends to stay with them, Grace is forced to confront her relationship with the past and her expectations of the future.

title: Godzilla Minus Zero
overview: In 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, the Shikishima family face an all-new calamity.

title: Fest Godzilla II: Tokyo Disappears
overview: Sequel to Fest Godzilla II: Shinjuku Burning. To premiere at the 2026 Godzilla Festival on 2026-11-03

title: Hope
overview: In the remote South Korean village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok and officer Sung-ae are called to investigate a mysterious creature wreaking havoc on the community. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.

title: Wild Horse Nine
overview: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ. Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

title: Archangel
overview: Reclusive government asset Henry Fitzgerald is living off the grid in Wyoming, designing new systems for a weapons research agency. When a multi trillion dollar investment management firm begins employing corrupt police and foreign mercenaries to force farmers off their ranches, the Green Beret veteran is forced to take action to assist his neighbors.

title: Women on Trial
overview: Follows the lawyer Gisèle Halimi and her historic defense of Basque individuals accused of crimes committed during the conflict in Basque Country.

title: La Gradiva
overview: A small group of French high school students goes on a school trip to Pompeii to discover its ruins and the bodies petrified by Vesuvius in 79 CE. It is in this ghost town that they are suddenly overcome by a dizzying sensation. One after another, James, Toni, Suzanne, and their Latin teacher, Mme Mercier, allow themselves to be engulfed by desire, anger, and despair—until they surrender to it completely and lose everything.

title: Goodbye Eri The Fan Film Live Action
overview: Yago, following a personal request from his ailing mother, begins to document his life through recordings. This film project takes an unexpected turn when it becomes intertwined with a mysterious figure named Eri, exploring the fine line between reality and fiction whilst grappling with grief and artistic creation.

title: Un jeu dangereux
overview: In a summer villa, a couple married for twenty years invites an enigmatic young woman. Amidst desire, jealousy, and unspoken words, a dangerous game unfolds where each plays their part. Their children, watching from afar, anxiously observe: who is playing with whom? Is their mother in danger?

title: The Cat in the Hat
overview: Doing what he does best, the Cat spreads joy to kids in his hilarious, signature, and singularly irreverent way, transporting them and audiences on a fantastical journey through a world they've never seen before. Our hero takes on his toughest assignment yet for the I.I.I.I. (Institute for the Institution of Imagination and Inspiration, LLC) to cheer up Gabby and Sebastian, a pair of siblings struggling to move to a new town. Known for taking things too far, this could be this agent of chaos' last chance to prove himself...or lose his magical hat!

title: Jennerwein – Hochsaison
overview: Jennerwein has barely started his job in Garmisch-Partenkirchen when a Danish ski jumper falls to his death, the president of the Winter Games Committee narrowly escapes an assassination attempt, and anonymous letters announce further crimes. Amidst suspicious villagers and vain local politics, Jennerwein must unmask a perpetrator who craves attention and is playing a deadly serious game.

title: Papaya
overview: Passionate about flying, a tiny papaya seed in the Amazonian forest must keep moving to avoid rooting. Through perseverance, she discovers the power of her roots, triggering a revolution that transforms her world and fulfills her dreams in an unexpected way.

title: The Last Bliss
overview: Follows a dysfunctional family at a luxury wellness centre deep in the forest who must confront their personal conflicts and escape an evil spirit.

title: Geister weinen nicht
overview: After her death, 17-year-old Aisha finds her way into Elias' dreams from the afterlife and a passionate romance begins in which the boundaries between dream and reality become blurred.

title: Kyiv. Day-Night
overview: The beloved main cast of the cult classic TV series Kyiv. Day and Night decide to take a road trip, reopening the doors to the memories of the past.

title: Einar Schleef - No Germany Did I Find
overview: With his monumental productions, Einar Schleef pushed theatre to the outer reaches, confounded expectations in East and West alike, grappled with GDR origins and the BRD present. A universal artist emerges from the archive: “I’m not human, I’m dynamite”.

title: Under the City Lights
overview: The story of two friends, a boy and a girl, finding more about each other during their long walks around Rome.

title: 7G Rainbow Colony 2
overview: Nearly 10 years post the tragic death of Anitha, Kathir's ailing mother makes desperate attempts to get him settled after sensing his attraction to the daughter of Flat No.7G's Newest Tenant.

title: The Harvester
overview: Álava, late 19th century. As the Third Carlist War rages, several women are found strangled to death on the outskirts of Vitoria.

title: Lakadbaggha 2: The Monkey Business
overview: Sequel to Lakadbaggha (2023). Plot TBA.

title: Kamen Rider Kabuto 20th: ​​The One Who Inherits the Heavens
overview: 20 years after the events of the series, in a world where humans and Worms coexist, what is the purpose of the reactivated ZECT? New Kamen Riders appear.

title: Arasan
overview: Taking place as an untold story in the same world as Vetrimaaran's Vadachennai, a man holds a struggling, dark past in the 1990s.

title: 3mm Love
overview: A quiet student falls for an exchange girl, but a painful misunderstanding and her sudden departure drive him to cross the sea to find her.

title: Dante
overview: Responding to an emergency call, a young paramedic unwittingly finds himself thrust into the middle of a war between two crime lords, triggering an escalating series of gruesome twists and turns over the course of one crazy night.

title: The Black Pearl
overview: A young engineer's dream of becoming a fighter pilot for the Royal Moroccan Air Force is put on hold until he unravels the mystery of his missing parents.

title: Drummer Boy
overview: Action-Musical from four-time Grammy-winners, for KING + COUNTRY, follows two brothers on opposite sides of the American Revolutionary War.

title: Wanderer
overview: WANDERER is a religious action thriller set in an alternate, dystopian future where the United States has been disbanded and divided into eight individual factions. A lone wanderer journeys across these factions, carrying a forbidden item: a Holy Bible. Hunted relentlessly by faction leaders and their military forces, the Wanderer uses the Word of God to spread hope among the oppressed citizens and fight back against the evil forces controlling them.

title: Tumšā robeža
overview: A historical thriller about Latvia in 1939 - a year before the Russian occupation.

title: Sterben für Anfänger
overview: As renowned science journalist Kurt Langbein is diagnosed with ‘terminal cancer’, a professional topic becomes an existential question: how do we die – and what does it actually mean to die? In his deeply personal documentary film, Langbein embarks on a journey to the boundary between life and death.

title: Untitled Abbott Le-Eldred Film
overview: No details have been provided for this film yet.

title: Ramayana
overview: An ancient epic follows a young prince and princess whose marriage and subsequent exile mark the beginning of a legendary journey. Their story of love, duty and destiny sets the stage for greater challenges ahead.

title: Malvina
overview: Malvina is an angel sent to earth for being ignorant of it's problems. she falls to earth and after an incounter with a grieving mother seeks adamentley the love she talks about. when receiving this love finally she becomes addicted. she is filled with so much love for everyone she eventually loses herself completely in the desires and wants of everyone around her.

title: The Great Beyond
overview: An author of popular fantasy novels discovers that the mythical world he’s known for creating is actually real.

title: Villeneuve: Rise of a Legend
overview: Berthierville, 1970. From a modest background, a young Quebecer with a passion for mechanics and speed decides to risk everything he owns, including the future of his young family, to try and make a name for himself in the highly selective world of top-level motor racing, a sport normally reserved for wealthy elites, relying solely on his raw and extraordinary talent. His name: Gilles Villeneuve.

title: Kaamelott: The Second Chapter (Part II)
overview: Third and final film in the Kaamelott franchise.

title: Il faut brûler maman
overview: A comedy of manners set in a funeral home.

title: Badinter
overview: Biopic about the famous French lawyer and politician, Robert Badinter.

title: Harvested 4
overview: A small town legend returns from the dead to serve vengeance on Thanksgiving night.

title: The House with Chimaeras
overview: At the peak of his career, famous Kyiv architect Władysław Horodecki is desperately fighting his own demons. At the same time, darkness emanated by the evil forces bringing menace to the city is gradually enveloping the entire Kyiv. To defeat evil, Horodecki has to take on the mission of creating an architectural Quadrangle of Good.

title: Shame and Money
overview: After losing their livelihood in a village, a Kosovar family is forced to move to the capital in pursuit of a place in a hypercapitalist society.

title: Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol
overview: Ebenezer Scrooge embarks on a supernatural journey to face his past, present and future and fight for a second chance at happiness.

title: Лукоморье
overview: Fantasy based on a script by Natalia Dobrovolskaya.

title: Identitti
overview: A student named Nivedita finds an old photo of her professor and discovers the latter had been living a lie. Saraswati, of all people — a woman of color who lectures on cultural identity — is in fact white. While the media and online community whip up a frenzy, Nivedita faces a political and personal dilemma as she tries to find out Saraswati's motive.

title: Scars of Revenge
overview: One has no memory, the other cannot forget.

title: Ananke
overview: In a dystopian future, the population is prohibited from having sexual relations. However, this measure will only come into effect at 12:00 a.m.

title: Santa's Workshop
overview: Nine-year-old Mari is really looking forward to Christmas. Her journalist dad, Svein, on the other hand, loves his job so much, he barely notices the festive season. One night, Mari’s Christmas list vanishes – and in its place lies a mysterious mitten. The mitten sends Mari, Svein and her adventurous grandma on an exciting quest to find Santa Claus. Meanwhile, Stubby the Wishlist Elf is in a panic — he’s lost his mitten, which might just lead this curious family straight to the secret location of Santa’s workshop! He must stop them before it’s too late!

title: Helene Weigel - Revolutionärin im Rampenlicht
overview: Who was Helene Weigel? Using impressive archive material, the film follows the convinced communist, acting icon, and free spirit from her early days in theater to her escape from the Nazi regime to the founding and management of the Berliner Ensemble. The result is a powerful portrait that finally puts the “woman at Brecht's side” in the spotlight.

title: Liberated from Paradise: Resonance of the Heart
overview: Anime movie sequel of Expelled from Paradise.

title: Return of the Living Dead
overview: Eighteen months after the events at the UNEEDA Warehouse in Louisville, KY, a new Trioxin 2-4-5 leak puts a small Pennsylvania town on the brink of a zombie outbreak during Christmas 1985.

title: UK Holiday
overview: A UK Holiday is not just a journey; it’s an adventure filled with love, laughter, and unforgettable memories. The story revolves around Aakash, a kind-hearted and adventurous young man, who invites his sister Rekha from the USA to visit the UK for a long-awaited family reunion. Rekha, excited to escape her routine, is thrilled to meet their mother, Subhadra, and sisters Priyanka and Deepika, who already reside in the UK. Aakash ensures this holiday becomes a truly special experience. Together, they explore London’s iconic landmarks like the London Eye and Tower Bridge. The journey takes them to the natural wonder of Durdle Door in Dorset and the charming town of Aldershot. Along the way, they share stories, laughter, and moments of deep connection. This feature film captures the essence of holidays—taking a break, reconnecting with loved ones, and creating memories that last a lifetime. UK Holiday is a celebration of family, adventure, and the joy of togetherness.

title: Plucked
overview: In Gilded Age New York, a rebellious woman plans to divorce her emotionally unstable husband. Consequently, a polite and civilized evening violently spirals into pandemonium. Some things never change-until they do.

title: The Death of Marion Wayne
overview: Marion Wayne is a chaotic gunslinger traveling the country with his small gang. When he gets captured by the law he learns of an indifference of power within the law, and upon breaking out of prison he pursues a revenge arc to balance the system.

title: Moral
overview: Moral is a quiet family drama set during Lucía’s birthday. Natalia is preparing a simple celebration when her estranged partner, Roberto, unexpectedly returns after years of absence.  His arrival disrupts the fragile atmosphere, bringing unresolved history and tension back into the home. As the day unfolds, Natalia is forced to navigate the emotional weight of the past while trying to protect the moment for her daughter.  Seen through Lucía’s innocent perspective, the story explores the silent fractures within a family and the lingering impact of absence, memory, and unspoken choices.

title: The Virus of Pathological Kindness
overview: On a cold winter's night in 1983, a young teacher of Serbo-Croatian recieves a surprise visit. A nude man, claiming to be from Belgrade in the far future tells her that the world as they know it will crumble and that he believes he knows how to stop it.

title: Break Out
overview: After six years of being locked away at 'Easton Detention Centre' after brutally murdering one of his classmates, Jackson Pickering (Carson Queen) breaks out of captivity and hunts down his old friend group lead by Craig Forester (Marcus Curran) and Bradley Banks (Nathan McCurley) for sweet, bloody vengeance. All the while being on the run from officers Stanley Adams and Jimmy Reynolds (Logan Smith & Jordan Boyd respectively).  'Break Out' is a black-comedic slasher made to be a tribute to both the spirit of old slasher horror flicks and the edge and violence of Troma Entertainment.

title: Super Champions
overview: Seven people think about their place in the universe.

title: Volcanic vs. Pedex
overview: Pedex was tasked with protecting the Shadow Realm after Amelia's death as a way of honoring her legacy. When Pedex senses an unnatural presence, he discovers it is Volcanic, the Fire Demon. Seeing this as an invasion, Pedex confronts him, and the two engage in a violent battle between Fire and Darkness. The conflict extends beyond the Shadow Realm and extends to the small fictional town of Oldwood, where the fighting becomes even more intense and destructive.

title: A Time in Eternity
overview: A woman embarks on an unyielding and possibly hopeless search for her missing husband, a journey that strains her already fragile relationship with her daughter. Along the way, she also faces the unwelcome advances of her persistent brother-in-law.

title: Iliya Muromets
overview: Iliya the Knight of Murom, son of a peasant, was born disabled and was unable to walk until he turned 33. He then was miraculously healed and became a great warrior during his faithful service to Kniaz Vladimir Monomakh by fighting against invaders and helping Kniaz consolide Russianlands.

title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
overview: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games, starting on the morning of the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.

title: Gabin
overview: In northern France, Gabin, the youngest child of the Jourdel family, is destined to take over his father’s butcher shop. Torn between family loyalty and a desire to break free, he has other dreams: training a show cow, becoming a dog breeder, and saving his mother’s farm from bankruptcy. Gabin follows the life of this young boy from age 8 to 18.

title: V. Shantaram
overview: Chronicles Shantaram Rajaram Vankudre, aka V. Shantaram, on his remarkable journey from the silent era through the advent of sound and colour, showcasing his evolution as one of India’s most influential filmmakers.

title: A Place to Heal
overview: In a French public hospital, the adolescent psychiatry unit moves to the erratic rhythm of teenagers coming and going - many carrying heavy past baggage - while Etienne and his medical team navigate the relentless cycle of treating, listening, and confronting the raw edges of suffering. Young Lucia knows the ward too well. After being brought back yet again by the police, she reunites with her friend Eloïse and encounters a constellation of young patients, each wrestling with their own storms. At times, there is laughter, small breakthroughs, moments of fragile hope. But the balance is shaky, and the arrival of a new patient will shatter it entirely.

title: Greenland
overview: Three years after a young girl’s disappearance during a trip to Norway, her passport resurfaces in Greenland. Without telling anyone, her 17-year-old sister embarks on a quest to solve the mystery of her disappearance. Torn between the hope of finding their first daughter and the fear of losing their second, her parents, though separated, set off together for Greenland.

title: Турбозавры. Суперфильм
overview: Viewers will learn about the new adventures of dinosaurs who can transform into cars, and the children Katya, Petya, and Ippolit.

title: The Loneliest Man in Town
overview: Blues musician Al Cook lives in an apartment filled with memories. Outside, the world carries on without him. But when his home is slated for demolition, out of the ruins of his existence, a long-forgotten dream suddenly resurfaces.

title: Разыскивается Дед Мороз
overview: On New Year's Eve, a not-so-lucky thief, Misha, breaks into a house in the very center of Moscow, where a lonely old man lives. Misha hopes to improve his unenviable financial situation and bring back his family - his wife and seven-year-old daughter. However, in the old man's big house, he finds nothing of any value, except for the deposits of children's toys in the basement. The old man himself assures him that he is none other than the real Father Frost.

title: Inherit
overview: Follows a wealthy family whose polished exterior begins to crack when an ancient centipede spirit infiltrates their bloodline.

title: GIANT - The Play
overview: In the summer of 1983, just before the release of The Witches, Giant imagines a tense meeting between Roald Dahl and his American and British publishers as they scramble to contain the fallout from his public denunciation of Israel and defence of the Palestinians in a review of a book on the 1982 Lebanon war. Filmed live onstage at the Harold Pinter Theatre in London's West End in 2025.

title: Der Regenbogenfisch
overview: The rainbow fish, an outsider obsessed with his glittering scales, learns the power of friendship on an adventurous sea voyage with the little blue fish. He finds his place in a colorful fish community—and realizes that sharing brings people together.

title: Mom and Dad are Gods
overview: In a clash of distant centuries and cultures, two children from the 7th century awaken inside a mystical cave from a thousand-year slumber into the chaotic 21st century. Along with them, two ancient Slavic gods rise, incarnating themselves as the parents of Petr and Simona, siblings from the 21st century, leading to countless entertaining adventures in which the four children join forces and bridge the gap between old and new times, cultures, and customs to save the souls of their parents, who are currently unbearably divine.

title: MEN TOO
overview: A man struggles to stay strong after a painful divorce, moving through his days with a quiet loneliness that no one notices. This PSA explores how a single moment of genuine care can change everything for someone who feels forgotten.

title: Jimmy
overview: A look into the life of American actor James Stewart, whose inspiring tale of valor, purpose and faith will win over everyone.

title: Way of the Warrior Kid
overview: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

title: The Tragedy of the Bernalillo County Detectives
overview: 1979. An intense conspiracy unfolds after the robbery of a legendary fortune.

title: Armored Trooper VOTOMS: Die Graue Hexe - Part 1
overview: A never-ending battlefield ruled by madness, but there was a witch who would surely rise again.

title: Beparwah
overview: Starring Dev Kharoud

title: The Beast of Gevaudan 3
overview: Plot TBA

title: The Adventures of Cliff Booth
overview: Eight years after the events of Once Upon a Time in... Hollywood, Cliff Booth returns to a changing Los Angeles. Now working as a fixer in the shadows of the Hollywood studio system, Cliff finds himself entangled in a dangerous web of secrets, crimes and betrayals that will test everything he knows about loyalty and survival.

title: Focker-In-Law
overview: Henry, son of Greg and Pam Focker, faces family chaos when he decides to marry a strong-willed woman who appears to be his complete mismatch.

title: Hexed
overview: An impulsive and unconventional teenage girl named Billie discovers secret magical abilities which, once unleashed, hurtle her into a spectacle-filled journey out of suburbia and into a vast witch realm called Hexe. Forced to team up with her cautious mother, Alice, they uncover family mysteries that could change the world of witches forever.

title: Demain, je tombe amoureux
overview: On the day of his retirement, Émile, a literature professor in Dieppe, gives his young students one last lesson on literature and love, encouraging them to become the poets of their own lives. A student asks him about his own feelings. Is Émile still in love with his wife? Unable to answer, he discovers, once he returns home, that his wife has left him. He is forced to apply his own precepts to himself. Two encounters and a reunion will then help him reinvent himself.

title: Congo Boy
overview: Bangui, Central African Republic. 17 year-old Robert dreams of a career in music, but civil war is tearing the country apart. When both his parents are thrown into prison, he is left to look after his four younger siblings on his own, juggling daily life, odd jobs, school exams and concert stages, determined to follow his dream.

title: Madden
overview: John Madden's remarkable journey-from a Super Bowl-winning partnership with Al Davis and the Raiders, to creating Madden NFL, and becoming one of the most iconic voices in football history.

title: Hershey
overview: The story behind one of the most famous chocolate companies in the world.

title: Pirate Mo and the Legend of the Red Ruby
overview: Aboard a ship, back when terrible pirates roamed the seven seas, a child, Mo, grows up with a crew of ragtag seadogs and the ship’s pet… goat. Having grown up into a brave girl, Mo must wrestle with her father’s career of piracy and overcome trials as she seeks to understand the enigma of her origin. Captured by the evil pirate Peg-Leg Olle, Mo bumps into cabin boy Hannes. Together with him, Claas and his motley crew, brave Mo will have to defeat Olle and find the Blood Red Blood Ruby of Doom, to restore peace and harmony to the land. Pirate Mo is a swashbuckling adventure full of heart, guts, and hope for a better world, led by a young girl whose goodness is matched only by her derring-do.

title: Knocker
overview: The Snegirev family is preparing to celebrate the New Year together for the last time, after which Anfisa and Igor will tell their son Roma about the divorce.

title: A December Tale 2: The Lost Letter
overview: Whilst preparing for yet another round of spreading holiday cheer, saint Nicholas discovers an unopened letter that had been sent to him by a young boy named Borys 30 years ago. Now the latter is a sucssesful businessman who had lost the abbility to see the joys and whimsy of life after being severly beaten down by the world around him. The legendary giftgiver enters a race against time to help the broken man regain his childlike wonder, or else one will forever loose the abbility to feel joy and the other, his magical powers.

title: Alexander I
overview: Catherine II always knew that her successor would not be her son Pavel, but her beloved grandson Aleksandr. From his earliest years, he was brought up as a future ruler - in strict discipline and with a brilliant education. Having finally become emperor, Aleksandr intended to continue the reforms of his predecessors - to abolish serfdom and introduce a constitution. But at the beginning of the 19th century, a war broke out between two great empires - France and Russia. Aleksandr had to go through a thorny path from brilliant reforms to the Patriotic War.

title: Дедмобиль
overview: Valera, a flawless driver with 30 years behind the wheel, loses his job just as his dog Lincoln needs an expensive lifesaving surgery. Desperate for income, he’s approached by a sleek, AI-powered self-driving taxi. To avoid spooking passengers, the car asks Valera to pretend to be its driver and help it achieve a top user rating — in exchange for all the earnings from their rides. For Valera, it’s his dog’s only chance; for the taxi, it’s a fight for its own survival.

title: Diya
overview: Dane, a driver in N’Djamena, hits a nine-year-old pupil walking home from school and takes him to the hospital. When he comes back the next day, he is told that the child has died. He pays a heavy price for his mistake. A few months later, he meets out of fate the boy he thought he killed.

title: Prasert
overview: Prasert, the owner of a corrupt rental car business, is chased by top gunmen from all over the country after becoming involved in the murder of the Eastern governor.

title: Tears of Neon
overview: At the age of five, Chris, a young village boy meets his mother, Czesława, who is at the cusp of conquering entertainment industry by adopting a new persona - Violetta Villas. An unbelievably talented, ambitious mother and a sensitive child go on a decades long journey through Warsaw, Paris and Las Vegas.

title: Switzerland
overview: Patricia Highsmith’s late life solitude in the Swiss Alps is interrupted by Edward, a young literary agent sent by the writer’s relentless publishing company to convince her to pen one last novel in her wildly popular Ripley series. Highsmith uses her famously macabre imagination to scare Edward away, but before they know it, a collaboration ensues, leaving the world they’ve constructed indistinguishable from their own.

title: Between Two Lovers
overview: A married woman pursues a simultaneous relationship with a female lover — and proposes that all three live together.

title: Upiro
overview: Spain, 1755. Ana is sent to a cloistered monastery where several nuns are afflicted by a mysterious  disease. With the help of an unorthodox priest, the young novice uncovers an ancient legend and  malevolent force: a bloodthirsty upiro.

title: Nosebleed
overview: A psycho-sexual queer thriller which blends fantasy and reality against a backdrop of the deep, dark web; told through the eyes of a prospective serial killer.

title: Jumprava: The Big Happening
overview: The epic story of one of the most iconic Latvian rock bands – Jumprava [Yumpravah]. The feature film tells the story about how the electronic rock group Jumprava was founded in 1984 and how it evolved throughout the years until 1991. With their songs and their unique style, Jumprava encouraged the “third awakening” in Latvia and inspired young people to dream big on this side of the Iron Curtain.

title: Eureka or (The Quest for Nothing)
overview: A lonely surfer sets out to find the holy grail.

title: Plastic Guns
overview: A standoff reveals unsettling truths for an old cowboy.

title: Kyle and Eric's Quest for the Golden Bong
overview: Two stoners go on an epic journey, filled with trials and challanges after finding a scroll that tells of a legendary lost artifact

title: Instrucciones para reparar un sombrero
overview: Jonas, a young magician who has retired from stage, is invited to participate in a film the chaotic production forces him to confront a past trauma, while unexpectedly giving him the chance to overcome it.

title: The Defectors
overview: In a near-future surveillance state, a detective secretly aligned with a rebellion investigates the assassination of their leader under the watchful eye of his manipulative new partner.

title: The Wonderful Wizard Of Ha's
overview: When a cosmic warp strikes a commuter tracks, a stylish teenager named Dorthy Ross ( Soroya Clayton-Wright) and her trusty dog poodle Smarty  are transported from the ordinary world straight into Stardust City—a glittering, neon-lit fantasy metropolis. Arriving in style aboard a custom-built, purple clockwork locomotive, she is greeted by the glamorous The Good Witch of the South ( Joh'Vonnie Monroe ), who welcomes her with a show-stopping musical number.  But the party is short-lived. Armed with a pink shirt, a purple poodle skirt, and a magical pair of silver slippers, the young trendsetter must navigate the dangers of the Yellow Brick Road after the Wicked Witch crashes the celebration. Packed with high-fashion aesthetics, explosive blue-diamond wand fireworks, and a soulful, show-stopping soundtrack, The Wonderful Wizard of Ha's is a bold, comedic, and modern reimagining of L. Frank Baum’s classic 1900 tale.

title: Behind Closed Doors
overview: Marie, a young doctor, experienced a miscarriage four months ago. Unable to grieve, the marriage to her French husband Jude starts to break apart. But when her parents pay them an unexpected visit, the world which Marie has built for herself so carefully starts to crumble.

title: SP-2125
overview: After receiving a mysterious email offering to fund his deep space exploration, Damen Richards must make his way to the moon to begin his journey across the stars.
